falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 15% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Confirms a bullish breakout contradicting the HOLD signal and invalidates the pattern's bearish implications

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 200% of the 14-day average on three consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Indicates extreme buying pressure that refutes the current HOLD stance and blowoff score interpretation

falsification_conditions.condition: The asset's price drops below the 2022 May Luna pattern's key support level (e.g., $0.38) by 20% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Validates a bearish breakdown that directly contradicts the pattern's historical bullish resolution

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
